news.name: Welcome to CST2000
news.content:
CST2000 is a class about nothing because it doesn't exists. Why are you reading fixture data?
This is a demo of the templating system:
lab1-monthDate: {{assignments.lab1.due.monthDate}}
lab1-month: {{assignments.lab1.due.month}}
lab1-monthShort: {{assignments.lab1.due.monthShort}}
lab1-weekDays: {{assignments.lab1.due.weekDays}}
lab1-weekDaysShort: {{assignments.lab1.due.weekDaysShort}}
lab1-iso8601: {{assignments.lab1.due.iso8601}}
lab1-date: {{assignments.lab1.due.date}}
quiz1-monthDate: {{quizzes.quiz1.due.monthDate}}
quiz1-month: {{quizzes.quiz1.due.month}}
quiz1-monthShort: {{quizzes.quiz1.due.monthShort}}
quiz1-weekDays: {{quizzes.quiz1.due.weekDays}}
quiz1-weekDaysShort: {{quizzes.quiz1.due.weekDaysShort}}
quiz1-iso8601: {{quizzes.quiz1.due.iso8601}}
quiz1-date: {{quizzes.quiz1.due.date}}

news.name: Late Policy
news.content: If you are late. You are not early.
